title: oldenlandia pulcherrima
intro: Oldenlandia pulcherrima, also known as the "redstem Oldenlandia" or "red stem Oldenlandia", is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It is native to China, India, and Southeast Asia, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oldenlandia pulcherrima include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically made into a decoction or infusion, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including hypertension, coughs, and colds.
